model_patch.entry/src/main/ets/pages/example/thirdpa:
--- a/entry/src/main/ets/pages/example/thirdpartyscenes/Scene_4.ets
+++ b/entry/src/main/ets/pages/example/thirdpartyscenes/Scene_4.ets
@@ -1,6 +1,34 @@
 import { LottieView, LottieController, lottie } from '@ohos/lottie-turbo'
 import { MyDataSource } from '../../../data/MyDataSource'
 import { ListScroller } from '@kit.ArkUI'
+
+@Reusable
+@Component
+struct LottieItemComponent {
+  @State path: string = ''
+  @State controller: LottieController | null = null
+  @State fileName: string = ''
+
+  aboutToReuse(params: { path: string, controller: LottieController, fileName: string }) {
+    this.path = params.path
+    this.controller = params.controller
+    this.fileName = params.fileName
+  }
+
+  build() {
+    Column() {
+      LottieView({
+        loop: true,
+        autoplay: true,
+        autoSkip: true,
+        path: $rawfile(this.path),
+        controller: this.controller,
+      })
+        .width('60%')
+        .height('30%')
+        .aspectRatio(1)
+        .backgroundColor('#F1F3F5')
+        .margin(10)
+        .onClick(() => {
+          this.controller?.play()
+        })
+      Text(this.fileName)
+        .fontSize(14)
+        .margin({ top: 5, bottom: 5 })
+        .textAlign(TextAlign.Center)
+        .maxLines(2)
+        .textOverflow({ overflow: TextOverflow.Ellipsis })
+    }
+  }
+}
